panels.title: Req/s
panels.description: Aggregate Phoenix request rate across all routes.

panels.title: HTTP p95
panels.description: 95th percentile request latency across all routes.

panels.title: CPU %
panels.description: Per-node host CPU utilization across selected cache instances.

panels.title: Xcode Disk Hit %
panels.description: Share of successful Xcode downloads served from local disk.

panels.title: Xcode Module Disk Hit %
panels.description: Share of successful module downloads served from local disk.

panels.title: Auth Cache Hit %
panels.description: Percentage of auth lookups satisfied from the local auth cache.

panels.title: Pending S3
panels.description: Current number of queued S3 transfers waiting to run.

panels.title: RAM %
panels.description: Per-node host memory pressure based on used versus available memory.

panels.title: FD %
panels.description: System file descriptor usage as a percentage of the configured limit.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(cache_s3_head_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(cache_s3_upload_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(cache_s3_download_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(cache_s3_delete_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))

panels.title: S3 Err/s
panels.description: Combined S3 HEAD, upload, download, and delete errors per second.

panels.title: Auth by Method (JWT vs Server vs Cache)
Overall Response Time
panels.description: Aggregate HTTP response time percentiles across all routes and selected cache instances.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (method, path, instance, le) (rate(cache_prom_ex_phoenix_http_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (method, path, instance, le) (rate(cache_prom_ex_phoenix_http_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (method, path, instance, le) (rate(cache_prom_ex_phoenix_http_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (method, path, instance, le) (rate(cache_prom_ex_phoenix_http_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Status Rate by Code
panels.description: Nginx response rates by exact HTTP status code, including 502s returned before Phoenix sees the request.

panels.title: 5xx Rate by Route Family
panels.description: Nginx 5xx response rates grouped by route family (cas, keyvalue, gradle, module, registry, metrics, other) so gateway and upstream failures are visible.

panels.title: Status Rate by Route Family
panels.description: Current nginx response rate by route family (cas, keyvalue, gradle, module, registry, metrics, other) and exact status code.

panels.title: Xcode Module Disk Cache Hit Rate
Xcode Module Download Artifact Size Distribution
Xcode Module Upload Artifact Size Distribution
S3 HEAD Request Rate by Result
S3 Upload & Download Rate by Result

targets.expr: (sum(rate(cache_s3_head_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(cache_s3_upload_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(cache_s3_download_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(cache_s3_delete_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))
100 * sum by (instance, url) (cache_prom_ex_finch_pool_in_use_connections{instance=~"$instance"}) / sum by (instance, url) (cache_prom_ex_finch_pool_size{instance=~"$instance"})

panels.description: System-wide file descriptor usage vs maximum limit. High usage can cause EMFILE errors.
panels.title: OS File Descriptors

panels.description: Percentage of system file descriptors in use. Alert threshold at 90%.
panels.title: FD Usage %

panels.description: Network socket states from the OS - TCP connections in various states
panels.title: TCP Socket States

panels.description: Open file descriptors per process - useful for identifying which process is consuming FDs
panels.title: Open FDs by Process

list.label: Deployment
list.name: deployment
list.query: All : cache-.*, Production : cache-[^-]+-[^-]+$, Staging : cache-.*-staging.*, Canary : cache-.*-canary.*
